etymology.description: phonetic 此(此) (cǐ, "this") + semantic 角(角) (jiǎo, "horn") -> beak
etymology.interpretation: The character 觜 (zuǐ, "beak") combines the phonetic element 此(此) (cǐ, "this") with the semantic element 角(角) (jiǎo, "horn"). The semantic part 角(角) suggests something pointed or protruding, which intuitively fits with the concept of a beak.
